options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -all
options.description: Creates categories of paths within all types. Default: All types are categorized.

options.name: -bbox2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to black box.

options.name: -bbox2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -bbox2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to instance group.

options.name: -bbox2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to macro.

options.name: -bbox2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to port.

options.name: -bbox2stdcell
options.description: Creates categories of paths from black box to standard cell.

options.name: -fp_file
options.description: Specifies the name of the floorplan file. Default: Uses the current floorplan file.

options.name: -hinst2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from hierarchical instance to black box.

options.name: -hinst2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -hinst2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from hierarchical instance to instance group.

options.name: -hinst2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from hierarchical instance to macro.

options.name: -hinst2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from hierarchical instance to port.

options.name: -hinst2stdcell
options.description: Creates categories of paths from hierarchical instance to standard cell.

options.name: -include_macros
options.description: Includes macros in addition to guides and fences for creating categories. Default: Macros are not considered.

options.name: -instgrp2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to black box.

options.name: -instgrp2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -instgrp2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to instance group.

options.name: -instgrp2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to macro.

options.name: -instgrp2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from instance group to port.

options.name: -instgrp2stdcell
options.description: fCreates categories of paths from instance group to standard cell.

options.name: -macro2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to black box.

options.name: -macro2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -macro2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to instance group.

options.name: -macro2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to macro.

options.name: -macro2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to port.

options.name: -macro2stdcell
options.description: Creates categories of paths from macro to standard cell.

options.name: -macros
options.description: Specifies the names of the macros to be used.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the timing paths should be categorized only for the specified master category.

options.name: -partitions
options.description: Specifies the names of the partitions to consider for extracting hierarchical information.

options.name: -port2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to black box.

options.name: -port2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -port2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to instance group.

options.name: -port2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to macro.

options.name: -port2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to port.

options.name: -port2stdcell
options.description: Creates categories of paths from port to std cell.

options.name: -stdcell2bbox
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to black box.

options.name: -stdcell2hinst
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to hierarchical instance.

options.name: -stdcell2instgrp
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to instance group.

options.name: -stdcell2macro
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to macro.

options.name: -stdcell2port
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to port.

options.name: -stdcell2stdcell
options.description: Creates categories of paths from standard cell to standard cell.

options.name: -types
options.description: Creates categories of paths within the type_list. Valid types are: port , macro , bbox , hinst ,stdcell.

options.name: -use_current_floorplan
options.description: Uses the current floorplan.
